category_sources: source_facts.description says woodpecker-cli is the CLI client for the Woodpecker Continuous Integration server; official CLI docs describe woodpecker-cli as a command-line utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies the CLI package; official documentation page title is CLI and names woodpecker-cli.
docs_sources: Official Woodpecker CI documentation has a dedicated CLI reference page for woodpecker-cli commands and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official CLI docs describe command-line administration, pipeline linting, local execution, and CI server interaction.
